title: Like a Prayer
why_this_song: Like a Prayer by Madonna (1989) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 19 times; first heard in: "When you call my name it's like a little prayer"
Appears 19 times; first heard in: "I'm down on my knees, I wanna take you there"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "When you call my name it's like a little prayer"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I hear your voice, it's like an angel sighin'"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "It's like a dream, no end and no beginning"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "prayer" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "prayer" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "there" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "there" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Like a Prayer" was released in 1989. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Like a Prayer" foi lançada em 1989. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Like a Prayer" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Like a Prayer" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
